headline: Elon Musk's SpaceX Shakes Up Bitcoin Market With $133 Million Transfer
summary: SpaceX, the space exploration company led by Elon Musk, has reportedly transferred over $133 million in Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC), causing a stir in the cryptocurrency market.

headline: Jensen Huang Believes He Has 4 Major 'Superpowers' But Doesn't Rate His Intelligence As One Of Them: Here's Why
summary: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang values resilience, endurance, and seizing opportunities over raw intelligence, as seen in his speech at Caltech.

headline: TSLA, BYND, IBM And More: 5 Stocks That Dominated Investor Buzz This Week
summary: Retail investors buzzed about 5 stocks, from Oct. 20 to Oct. 24, on X and Reddit's r/WallStreetBets: TSLA, BYND, RGTI, IBM, AMZN.

headline: As Robots Rise, Elon Musk Pitches 'Universal High Income' Again: Can AI Fund Jobless Future?
summary: Elon Musk claims that in the future, working will be optional and there will be a universal high income thanks to automation.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Beyond Meat, Intel, Newmont — And Inflation Numbers Boost Rate Cut Hopes
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Ex-Stellantis CEO Warns Tesla May Not Survive Next Decade As BYD Drives Ahead: 'Elon Musk Will...'
summary: Elon Musk-led Tesla Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA) could face steep challenges in the coming decade, with the company's long-term survival uncertain, according to former Stellantis (NYSE: STLA) CEO Carlos Tavares.

headline: Elon Musk Loses Another Top Executive As X's Ad Chief Reportedly Quits
summary: John Nitti, who served as global head of revenue operations and advertising innovation at X, has left the social media company after just 10 months in the role, according to a report by the Financial Times on Friday.

headline: Netflix Shutters Mobile Game Studio Behind 'Squid Game: Unleashed'
summary: Netflix is closing its mobile game studio Boss Fight Entertainment, creator of Squid Game: Unleashed, as part of a strategic shift toward narrative, party, kids, and mainstream games, while keeping existing titles live and continuing to focus on revenue diversification through subscriptions and advertising.

headline: Trump's $300 Million White House Ballroom Could Soon Bear A Very Familiar Name
summary: President Donald Trump is reportedly planning to name his new $300 million White House ballroom after himself.
